statement: IRAP (run by ASD, assessing against ISM/PSPF) remains an active assessment program, and government data-centre/hosting assurance is administered via the DTA Hosting Certification Framework (which replaced the Cloud Services Certification Program, ceased 2 March 2020).

evidence.quote: independent security assessment services... against the ISM
the Cloud Services Certification Program (CSCP) ceased on 2 March 2020

falsifier: cyber.gov.au showing IRAP discontinued, or DTA showing the Hosting Certification Framework retired, would falsify this.
